channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe
item.description: arXiv:2606.28692v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Treatment reasoning underpins every therapeutic decision, integrating disease context, comorbidities, medications, contraindications, and evolving biomedical knowledge to select an appropriate therapy. It is inherently iterative: candidates are weighe...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, model, tool, framework, GPT | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> platform, model, tool, prompt engineering, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, context, model, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: code-review-graph - Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (Hugging Face Blog)
